callout.p: 源码校准补充（2026-06-04）：下面 ER 图按当前 server/store.ts 的 SQLite schema 整理。当前实现表结构与文档中目标态账号/租户/A2A 表存在差距，建议本节后续拆成“当前实现 ER”和“目标态 ER”两张图。

whiteboard:
erDiagram AGENTS ||--o{ AGENT_VERSIONS : versions AGENTS ||--o{ SESSIONS : runs AGENTS ||--o{ AGENT_DEPLOYMENTS : deployed_as ENVIRONMENTS ||--o{ SESSIONS : hosts SESSIONS ||--o{ SESSION_THREADS : contains SESSIONS ||--o{ SESSION_EVENTS : emits SESSIONS ||--o{ TOOL_CALLS : records USERS ||--o{ AUTH_SESSIONS : owns USERS ||--o{ MODEL_CONFIGS : owns USERS ||--o{ GATEWAY_KEYS : owns USERS ||--o{ AGENT_DEPLOYMENTS : owns GATEWAY_KEYS ||--o{ GATEWAY_USAGE : meters VAULTS ||--o{ VAULT_CREDENTIALS : contains MEMORY_STORES ||--o{ MEMORIES : stores MEMORIES ||--o{ MEMORY_VERSIONS : versions SKILLS ||--o{ SKILL_VERSIONS : versions
AGENTS { text id PK text name text description text config_json text created_at text updated_at } AGENT_VERSIONS { text id PK text agent_id FK integer version text config_json text created_at } ENVIRONMENTS { text id PK text name text config_json text created_at } SESSIONS { text id PK text agent_id FK text environment_id FK text title text status text runtime_json text metadata_json text created_at text updated_at } SESSION_THREADS { text id PK text session_id FK text title text created_at } SESSION_EVENTS { text id PK text session_id FK text type text role text content text metadata_json text created_at } TOOL_CALLS { text id PK text session_id FK text name text input_json text output_json text status text created_at } VAULTS { text id PK text name text description text created_at } VAULT_CREDENTIALS { text id PK text vault_id FK text key text value_ref text created_at } MEMORY_STORES { text id PK text name text description text created_at } MEMORIES { text id PK text memory_store_id FK text path text content text created_at text updated_at } MEMORY_VERSIONS { text id PK text memory_id FK integer version text content text created_at } SKILLS { text id PK text name text description text path text manifest_json text created_at } SKILL_VERSIONS { text id PK text skill_id FK integer version text manifest_json text created_at } TEMPLATES { text id PK text name text description text config_json text created_at } USERS { text id PK text email text name text avatar_url text provider text provider_user_id text created_at } AUTH_SESSIONS { text id PK text user_id FK text token_hash text expires_at text created_at } MODEL_CONFIGS { text id PK text owner_user_id FK text provider text base_url text model text api_key_ref integer is_default text created_at } GATEWAY_KEYS { text id PK text user_id FK text key_hash text key_prefix integer quota_limit integer quota_used text created_at } GATEWAY_USAGE { text id PK text gateway_key_id FK text model_config_id integer prompt_tokens integer completion_tokens integer total_tokens text used_at } AGENT_DEPLOYMENTS { text id PK text user_id FK text agent_id FK text endpoint_path text status text created_at }

tr.td: 按 session 拉取事件时间线
memory store 内按 path upsert/查询
按 token hash 找登录会话
按 gateway key 和时间统计用量
